name: RPCG Public Company Limited
summary: RPCG Public Company Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the energy and real estate businesses in Thailand. The company engages in the manufacture and distribution of biodiesel, and glycerin. It is also involved in the sale of equipment, including repair and maintenance services, and construction to petroleum service stations; sale of liquefied petroleum gas through a network of gas stations; and provision of systems management services. The company was formerly known as Rayong Purifier Public Company Limited and changed its name to RPCG Public Company Limited in January 2014. RPCG Public Company Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
